productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men Arena Brown Formal Shoes
description: Classy, stylish and uber cool, these Arena formal slip-ons with a pointed toe design from buckaroo are a must have in every suave man's collection. Since they have no laces, you can get into and out of them with utmost ease.Made from high quality leather, they are comfortable enough to be worn all day long. If you want to look awesome and feel great, they are your best bet. When it's time for power dressing, it's time to wear these shoes! Upper Full grain leather upper, for added durability and style Pointed toe design for increased style Leather wrap-around overlay along the heel and midfoot for better support Hidden elastic gores on either side for a more versatile Fit Laceless design for easy removal and wearing of shoes Lightly padded collar and tongue for in-step comfort and a snug fit Brand badge on the midfoot Midsole EVA midsole with shock absorbers for lightweight comfort Well-cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Leather lining to absorb moisture and keep feet dry Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Textured patterns on the forefoot and heel for improved grip Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not store in direct sunlight
